flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Villa Maria College rose 32% between 2006 and 2009 ($11.3k → $14.9k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Villa Maria College fell 29% between 2021 and 2024 (33.0% → 23.3%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Villa Maria College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($25.9k → $28.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Villa Maria College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (8.3% → 0.0%).
